title: Tula, Tula Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tula, Tula Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tula is a city in Tula Oblast with a population of 470,000. A historic city south of Moscow, famous for its gingerbread, samovars, and the Tula Kremlin, a key defensive fortress.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
